name: Not Enough Mana
description: Not Enough Mana is the affectionate tabletop parody of Magic: The Gathering — five mana colors, a creature combat phase, instants and sorceries, and the eternal frustration of drawing nothing but lands (or none at all). Plays fast and pokes fun at every TCG cliché. For anyone who has ever screamed "mana screw!" at the heavens.
